sglang.title: [BUGFIX] fix radix cache memory consumption to avoid OOM
sglang.author: yizhang2077
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

When radix tree does splitting, new_node and child both hold the view for inserted value, so when child is evicted, child.value will not return to torch memory pool until all nodes along path hold the view of value are evicted. It may cause dynamic CUDA OOM when tree shares long prefix
T

sglang.title: [DLLM] Implement initial dynamic batching for diffusion LLM
sglang.author: ClawSeven
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The current dLLM implementations lack batching capabilities, with batch size set to 1 by default. Additionally, the existing dLLM implementation is tightly coupled with chunked prefill execution, limiting flexibility and extensibility.

This PR introduces two key improvement

When MMMU dataset parquet files are corrupted in HuggingFace cache (ArrowInvalid: Parquet magic bytes not found), the lmms_eval process fails without producing JSON results, causing CI test failures.

sglang.title: [diffusion] default 4-step inference for Flux2-Klein distilled models
sglang.author: RuixiangMa
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Flux2Klein is step-distilled and optimized for 4-step inference. This change provides the optimal default while still allowing users to specify custom step counts.
Modifications
Accuracy Tests

sglang.title: Add runner utilization report workflow
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Tracks idle/active time per runner label to understand machine utilization. Helps identify when to add more runners (high utilization) or when runners are over-provisioned (low utilization).
Runs daily at 8 AM UTC. Can also trigger manually with custom time window and label filter.
Example output:

Add prefix parameter to vision layers for quantized weight mapp
